findings.description: The PDF uses a three-column layout for agenda items (time, topic/details, presenter) which is collapsed in the HTML into a single-column flow where the presenter name is placed inline with the topic rather than right-aligned as a distinct column.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, presenter names (e.g., '(Neelufa Sarwar)', '(Brian McCrodden)') are right-aligned in a separate column. In the HTML, they appear inline parenthetically after the topic title.

findings.description: Bullet points converted from bullet symbols to dashes
findings.evidence: PDF uses bullet points (•) for sub-items under each agenda topic; HTML uses dashes (-) instead. This is a minor formatting difference that does not change meaning.
